---
title: "Program"
toc: true
---

The detailed scientific program for the 2nd Peritoneal Summit will be released in **spring 2027**, approximately six months before the event.

The 1st Summit (Pontresina 2025) followed a three-day format with keynote talks, themed sessions, workshops, and dedicated networking time — we are building on the same structure for 2027 with an expanded scope.

## Provisional structure — September 2027

::: {.callout-note}
The information below is indicative and will be replaced by the full program once finalized.
:::

### Wednesday 8 September 2027

Arrival and welcome reception. Evening campfire session for early-career scientists.

### Thursday 9 September 2027

Full scientific day — keynote talks, themed sessions (peritoneal immunity, cancer, fibrosis, dialysis, endometriosis, bioengineering), poster session, networking dinner.

### Friday 10 September 2027

Workshops, late-breaking talks, awards, and closing.

## Themes

The program is structured around the major scientific fronts in peritoneal research:

- **Peritoneal immunity and tissue repair**
- **Peritoneal cancer and metastasis**
- **Endometriosis**
- **Peritoneal dialysis and fibrosis**
- **Imaging, single-cell, and spatial methods**
- **Biomaterials and surgical innovation**

<!-- TODO: replace with full block schedule once confirmed -->
